## Epic 5 — Magic System (#57)

**Dependency:** #50, #51
**Est. Effort:** Extra Large

### Goal
Design and write spell chains for 6th-9th level equivalent spells — the apex of magical power.

### Chains to Design
| Chain Name | Grandmaster (6th-7th) | Legendary (8th-9th) | Dice Req |
|------------|----------------------|---------------------|----------|
| Fire Magic | Sunbeam / Fire Storm | Incendiary Cloud / Meteor Swarm | 5 Fire |
| Ice Magic | Otiluke's Freezing Sphere | Abi-Dalzim's Horrid Wilting | 5 Water |
| Lightning | Chain Lightning | Storm of Vengeance | 5 Wind |
| Arcane Supreme | Disintegrate | Power Word Kill | 5 Energy |
| Divine Light | Sunburst | Mass Heal | 5 Animal + 2 Energy |
| Necromancy | Circle of Death | Power Word Kill (necro) | 5 Energy |
| Time/Space | Arcane Gate | Time Stop | 5 Reason |
| Mind | Mass Suggestion | Psychic Scream | 5 Guile |
| Protection | Globe of Invulnerability | Invulnerability | 5 Protection |
| Transformation | Tenser's Transformation | True Polymorph | 5 Reason |
| Summoning | Planar Ally | Gate | 5 Energy + 3 specific |
| Divination | True Seeing | Foresight | 5 Knowledge |

### Tasks
- [ ] Design 15-20 spells at Grandmaster/Legendary tier
- [ ] Write each with Weak/Standard/Strong effects
- [ ] Maximum dice prerequisites (5-8 specific dice)
- [ ] Write as formatted AsciiDoc entries
